title: Cute Mob Models: Kamen Rider Craft Patch
description: An add-on to CMMRP that gives KRC Mod's new villager variants their own CMM textures
body:
An add-on to Cute Mob Models Resource Pack that's made specifically for Kamen Rider Craft Mod!

This resource pack add-on give the mod's Humagear and Shocker Villagers their own CMM-style textures, allowing them to no longer look like glitches but rather anime girls you kinda wish you could date in Minecraft! ;)

(Man, how long has it been since Mob Talker became a thing lol)

Currently, this add-on is only compatible with 1.12.2 version of the resource pack due to the Kamen Rider Craft Mod being available for this version of Minecraft only.

(Also, I am NOT part of either CMMRP or KRC's Dev Team, so I can't really answer things like "1.19.2 please?" or such. I'm just a 3rd party making this add-on for people who are interested in playing both of these.)

NOTE: Just like CMMRP (which is required for this add-on btw), this resource pack add-on requires OptiFine in order to function properly.

But more important than that, this add-on is also meant to work with Kamen Rider Craft Mod. So you'll also need that mod installed first if you're planning on trying this add-on.

If the resource pack is not working correctly, please check following settings.

"Video Settings → Quality → Custom Entity Models" → ON.

"Video Settings → Quality → Random Entity" → ON.

"Video Settings → Animations → Texture Animated" → ON.

- Download Cute Mob Models Resource Pack (1.12.2 VB 1.4) here.

- Download Kamen Rider Craft Mod (v.1.12.1 or higher) here.

Credit:

- Kelco_K22 (Creator of Kamen Rider Craft Mod)

- yarrmateys (Creator of Yarr Cute Mob Models Mod)

- CMMRP Dev Team (LugiaGamerYT, emmie_4, Minedollcat, etc.)

Future Plans:

- Blinking Animations

- Give Humagear Villager its own outfit that's not just a retool of existing ones

KRC Mod Discord Server: https://discord.gg/3b37BRX

CMMRP Discord Server: https://discord.gg/uRanGDM

"Kamen Rider" and its related characters are all owned by Toei Company, Ltd.
No profit shall be made from this resource pack whatsoever.
